canonical_definition: A dataset providing pixel-level segmentation masks for a subset of the ImageNet dataset, used for evaluating semantic segmentation and object localization.
papers: Explaining Modern Gated-Linear RNNs via a Unified Implicit Attention Formulation
Interpreting and Editing Vision-Language Representations to Mitigate Hallucinations

definitions.text: A dataset providing pixel-level segmentation masks for a subset of the ImageNet dataset, used for evaluating semantic segmentation and object localization.
definitions.paper: Explaining Modern Gated-Linear RNNs via a Unified Implicit Attention Formulation

definitions.text: A dataset derived from ImageNet used for evaluating object segmentation performance, applied here to test the zero-shot segmentation capabilities derived from internal model representations.
definitions.paper: Interpreting and Editing Vision-Language Representations to Mitigate Hallucinations

characterization: A dataset providing pixel-level segmentation masks for a subset of the ImageNet dataset, used for evaluating semantic segmentation and object localization.
